summary: Iteration 448 - Responsive Support System Testing. All 14 test cases passed. Desktop (>=1024px) shows floating chatbot, live chat, and feedback widgets. Mobile/Tablet (<1024px) shows bottom support dock with Chat/Support/Feedback buttons. Bottom sheets open correctly with inline chatbot and live chat content. Body padding-bottom:72px prevents dock from covering content on mobile/tablet.
critical_code_review_comments: ResponsiveSupportWrapper.jsx: Well-structured orchestration of responsive rendering based on viewport width
SupportDock.jsx: Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes for all buttons
SupportBottomSheet.jsx: Good implementation with drag-to-dismiss, backdrop dismiss, ESC key support, and body scroll lock
useViewport.js: Efficient viewport detection with requestAnimationFrame debouncing
AIChatbot.js: Properly supports inline/forceOpen/hideFloating props for responsive rendering
LiveChatWidget.js: Properly supports inline/forceOpen/hideFloating props for responsive rendering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive support system fully implemented and tested. Desktop (>=1024px) shows floating widgets at bottom-right. Mobile/Tablet (<1024px) shows bottom support dock with slide-up bottom sheets. All data-testid attributes in place: support-dock, dock-chat-btn, dock-support-btn, dock-feedback-btn, support-bottom-sheet, support-sheet-close, support-sheet-backdrop, chatbot-inline, livechat-inline, chatbot-toggle, chat-widget-button, feedback-toggle.

MOBILE_VIEWPORT_375px.support_dock_visible: VERIFIED - fixed at bottom with Chat/Support/Feedback buttons
MOBILE_VIEWPORT_375px.body_padding_bottom: VERIFIED - 72px padding prevents dock from covering content
MOBILE_VIEWPORT_375px.chat_bottom_sheet: VERIFIED - opens with AI chatbot inline content
MOBILE_VIEWPORT_375px.support_bottom_sheet: VERIFIED - opens with live chat inline content

TABLET_VIEWPORT_768px.support_dock_visible: VERIFIED - fixed at bottom with Chat/Support/Feedback buttons
